ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Overall quality is good, but naturalness could be improved with less formal language.<short note: "Consider using more conversational tone while maintaining authority."

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>3<TAB>Basis for the response is correct but lacks context relevance and naturalness. <short note: "Include specifics about security protocol to enhance understanding of why access isn't granted."
